## Related issue

Closes #

## Proposal file

`proposals/NDP-xxxxx.md`

## Type of change

- [ ] New indicator concept
- [ ] New indicator version (modified criteria)
- [ ] Add citations to existing indicator version
- [ ] Taxonomy change
- [ ] Documentation only

## Files included

- [ ] `proposals/NDP-xxxxx.md`
- [ ] `indicators/concepts/NDI-xxxxxx.yaml`
- [ ] `indicators/versions/NDI-xxxxxx-vN.yaml`
- [ ] `taxonomy/nodes/NDT-x.x.x-nodes.csv`
- [ ] `taxonomy/edges/NDT-x.x.x-edges.csv`

## Checklist

- [ ] Indicator ID generated using `python tools/id_generation.py`
- [ ] Indicator title is a noun phrase (not an imperative)
- [ ] Description is 2–5 sentences, observable and neutral
- [ ] At least one supporting citation included
- [ ] At least one dissenting citation included (or documented as unavailable)
- [ ] Evidence criteria are auditable — specific source types named
- [ ] `python tools/validation_scripts.py` passes
